name: open-design
description: Local-first design product: detects your installed code-agent CLI, runs design skills + design systems, streams artifacts into a sandboxed preview.
stack: Next.js 16 + React 18 monorepo (pnpm workspaces); Electron desktop; local Node ~24 daemon

notes.root_command_boundary: Root scripts are reserved for repo-level checks and tools control-plane entrypoints only: pnpm guard, pnpm typecheck, pnpm tools-dev, pnpm tools-pack, pnpm tools-serve. Do NOT add root aggregate pnpm build/test aliases. Build/test commands must stay package-scoped (pnpm --filter <package> ...) or tool-scoped (pnpm tools-pack ...).
notes.install_after_manifest_change: Run pnpm install after changing package manifests, workspace layout, or command entrypoints.
notes.desktop: Desktop app is Electron (apps/desktop + apps/packaged), NOT Tauri. Unsigned macOS build: pnpm tools-pack mac build --to all (code signing is opt-in via --signed).
notes.upstream: Fork of nexu-io/open-design. origin = GQAdonis/open-design; upstream = git@github.com:nexu-io/open-design.git.
notes.openspec: OpenSpec 1.4.1 initialized for claude, codex, opencode, kimi. Structure at openspec/{specs,changes,changes/archive}. Slash commands: /opsx:new, /opsx:ff, /opsx:apply, /opsx:verify, /opsx:archive.
